coder v0.13.7

  • Reference
  • Articles
    • Interpret regular expressions
    • Classcodes
    • Example data
  • Changelog

Set classcodes object

Source: R/set_classcodes.R
set_classcodes.Rd

Prepare a classcodesobject by specifying the regular expressions to use for classification.

set_classcodes(
  cc,
  classified = NULL,
  regex = NULL,
  start = TRUE,
  stop = FALSE,
  tech_names = NULL
)

Arguments

cc

classcodes object (or name of a default object from all_classcodes()).
classified

object that classcodes could be inherited from
regex

name of column with regular expressions to use for classification. NULL (default) uses attr(obj, "regexpr")[1].
start, stop

should codes start/end with the specified regular expressions? If TRUE, column "regex" is prefixed/suffixed by ^/$.
tech_names

should technical column names be used? If FALSE, colnames are taken directly from group names of cc, if TRUE, these are changed to more technical names avoiding special characters and are prefixed by the name of the classification scheme. NULL (by default) preserves previous names if cc is inherited from classified (fall backs to FALSE if not already set).

Value

classcodes object.

See also

Other classcodes: all_classcodes(), as.data.frame.classified(), classcodes, codebook(), print.classcodes(), print.classified(), summary.classcodes(), visualize.classcodes()

Examples

# Prepare a classcodes object for the Charlson comorbidity classification
# based on the default regular expressions
set_classcodes(charlson)   # by object

#> Classification based on: icd10
#> 
#> Classcodes object
#>  
#> Regular expressions:
#>    icd10 
#> Indices:
#>    charlson, deyo_ramano, dhoore, ghali, quan_original, quan_updated   
#> 
#> # A tibble: 17 x 9
#>    group   description   icd10   charlson deyo_ramano dhoore ghali quan_original
#>    <chr>   <chr>         <chr>      <dbl>       <dbl>  <dbl> <dbl>         <dbl>
#>  1 myocar… Acute myocar… ^(I2([…        1           1      1     1             1
#>  2 conges… Heart failur… ^(I(09…        1           1      1     4             1
#>  3 periph… Peripheral v… ^(I7([…        1           1      1     2             1
#>  4 cerebr… Cerebrovascu… ^(G4[5…        1           1      1     1             1
#>  5 dement… Senile and p… ^(F0([…        1           1      1     0             1
#>  6 chroni… Chronic obst… ^((I27…        1           1      1     0             1
#>  7 rheuma… Systemic lup… ^(M(0[…        1           1      1     0             1
#>  8 peptic… Gastric, duo… ^(K2[5…        1           1      1     0             1
#>  9 mild l… Alcoholic ci… ^(B18|…        1           1      1     0             1
#> 10 diabet… Diabetes wit… ^(E1[0…        1           1      1     0             1
#> 11 hemipl… Paraplegia. … ^(G(04…        2           1      1     0             2
#> 12 renal … Chronic glom… ^(I1(2…        2           1      1     3             2
#> 13 diabet… Diabetes wit… ^(E1[0…        2           1      1     0             2
#> 14 malign… Malignant ne… ^(C([0…        2           1      1     0             2
#> 15 modera… Hepatic coma… ^(I(8(…        3           1      1     0             3
#> 16 metast… Secondary ma… ^(C(7[…        6           1      1     0             6
#> 17 AIDS/H… HIV infectio… ^(B2[0…        6           1      1     0             6
#> # … with 1 more variable: quan_updated <dbl>
set_classcodes("charlson") # by name

#> Classification based on: icd10
#> 
#> Classcodes object
#>  
#> Regular expressions:
#>    icd10 
#> Indices:
#>    charlson, deyo_ramano, dhoore, ghali, quan_original, quan_updated   
#> 
#> # A tibble: 17 x 9
#>    group   description   icd10   charlson deyo_ramano dhoore ghali quan_original
#>    <chr>   <chr>         <chr>      <dbl>       <dbl>  <dbl> <dbl>         <dbl>
#>  1 myocar… Acute myocar… ^(I2([…        1           1      1     1             1
#>  2 conges… Heart failur… ^(I(09…        1           1      1     4             1
#>  3 periph… Peripheral v… ^(I7([…        1           1      1     2             1
#>  4 cerebr… Cerebrovascu… ^(G4[5…        1           1      1     1             1
#>  5 dement… Senile and p… ^(F0([…        1           1      1     0             1
#>  6 chroni… Chronic obst… ^((I27…        1           1      1     0             1
#>  7 rheuma… Systemic lup… ^(M(0[…        1           1      1     0             1
#>  8 peptic… Gastric, duo… ^(K2[5…        1           1      1     0             1
#>  9 mild l… Alcoholic ci… ^(B18|…        1           1      1     0             1
#> 10 diabet… Diabetes wit… ^(E1[0…        1           1      1     0             1
#> 11 hemipl… Paraplegia. … ^(G(04…        2           1      1     0             2
#> 12 renal … Chronic glom… ^(I1(2…        2           1      1     3             2
#> 13 diabet… Diabetes wit… ^(E1[0…        2           1      1     0             2
#> 14 malign… Malignant ne… ^(C([0…        2           1      1     0             2
#> 15 modera… Hepatic coma… ^(I(8(…        3           1      1     0             3
#> 16 metast… Secondary ma… ^(C(7[…        6           1      1     0             6
#> 17 AIDS/H… HIV infectio… ^(B2[0…        6           1      1     0             6
#> # … with 1 more variable: quan_updated <dbl>

# Same as above but based on regular expressions for ICD-8 (see `?charlson`)
set_classcodes(charlson, regex = "icd8_brusselaers")

#> 
#> Classcodes object
#>  
#> Regular expressions:
#>    icd8_brusselaers 
#> Indices:
#>    charlson, deyo_ramano, dhoore, ghali, quan_original, quan_updated   
#> 
#> # A tibble: 13 x 9
#>    group    description      icd8_brusselaers  charlson deyo_ramano dhoore ghali
#>    <chr>    <chr>            <chr>                <dbl>       <dbl>  <dbl> <dbl>
#>  1 myocard… Acute myocardia… ^(41[0-2])               1           1      1     1
#>  2 congest… Heart failure.   ^(4270|428)              1           1      1     4
#>  3 periphe… Peripheral vasc… ^(44[0-5])               1           1      1     2
#>  4 cerebro… Cerebrovascular… ^(43[0-8])               1           1      1     1
#>  5 dementia Senile and pres… ^(290[01])               1           1      1     0
#>  6 chronic… Chronic obstruc… ^(49[0-3]|51[5-8…        1           1      1     0
#>  7 rheumat… Systemic lupus … ^(7(1[0-2]|34))          1           1      1     0
#>  8 hemiple… Paraplegia. Hem… ^(344)                   2           1      1     0
#>  9 renal d… Chronic glomeru… ^(40[34]|58[0-3]…        2           1      1     3
#> 10 diabete… Diabetes with r… ^(250)                   2           1      1     0
#> 11 maligna… Malignant neopl… ^(1([4-68][0-9]|…        2           1      1     0
#> 12 moderat… Hepatic coma, p… ^(070|4560|51[1-…        3           1      1     0
#> 13 metasta… Secondary malig… ^(19[6-9])               6           1      1     0
#> # … with 2 more variables: quan_original <dbl>, quan_updated <dbl>

# Only recognize codes if no other characters are found after the relevant codes
# Hence if the code vector stops with the code
set_classcodes(charlson, stop = TRUE)

#> Classification based on: icd10
#> 
#> Classcodes object
#>  
#> Regular expressions:
#>    icd10 
#> Indices:
#>    charlson, deyo_ramano, dhoore, ghali, quan_original, quan_updated   
#> 
#> # A tibble: 17 x 9
#>    group   description   icd10   charlson deyo_ramano dhoore ghali quan_original
#>    <chr>   <chr>         <chr>      <dbl>       <dbl>  <dbl> <dbl>         <dbl>
#>  1 myocar… Acute myocar… ^(I2([…        1           1      1     1             1
#>  2 conges… Heart failur… ^(I(09…        1           1      1     4             1
#>  3 periph… Peripheral v… ^(I7([…        1           1      1     2             1
#>  4 cerebr… Cerebrovascu… ^(G4[5…        1           1      1     1             1
#>  5 dement… Senile and p… ^(F0([…        1           1      1     0             1
#>  6 chroni… Chronic obst… ^((I27…        1           1      1     0             1
#>  7 rheuma… Systemic lup… ^(M(0[…        1           1      1     0             1
#>  8 peptic… Gastric, duo… ^(K2[5…        1           1      1     0             1
#>  9 mild l… Alcoholic ci… ^(B18|…        1           1      1     0             1
#> 10 diabet… Diabetes wit… ^(E1[0…        1           1      1     0             1
#> 11 hemipl… Paraplegia. … ^(G(04…        2           1      1     0             2
#> 12 renal … Chronic glom… ^(I1(2…        2           1      1     3             2
#> 13 diabet… Diabetes wit… ^(E1[0…        2           1      1     0             2
#> 14 malign… Malignant ne… ^(C([0…        2           1      1     0             2
#> 15 modera… Hepatic coma… ^(I(8(…        3           1      1     0             3
#> 16 metast… Secondary ma… ^(C(7[…        6           1      1     0             6
#> 17 AIDS/H… HIV infectio… ^(B2[0…        6           1      1     0             6
#> # … with 1 more variable: quan_updated <dbl>

# Accept code vectors with strings which do not necessarily start with the code.
# This is useful if the code might appear in the middle of a longer character
# string or if a common prefix is used for all codes.
set_classcodes(charlson, start = FALSE)

#> Classification based on: icd10
#> 
#> Classcodes object
#>  
#> Regular expressions:
#>    icd10 
#> Indices:
#>    charlson, deyo_ramano, dhoore, ghali, quan_original, quan_updated   
#> 
#> # A tibble: 17 x 9
#>    group   description   icd10   charlson deyo_ramano dhoore ghali quan_original
#>    <chr>   <chr>         <chr>      <dbl>       <dbl>  <dbl> <dbl>         <dbl>
#>  1 myocar… Acute myocar… I2([12…        1           1      1     1             1
#>  2 conges… Heart failur… I(099|…        1           1      1     4             1
#>  3 periph… Peripheral v… I7([01…        1           1      1     2             1
#>  4 cerebr… Cerebrovascu… G4[56]…        1           1      1     1             1
#>  5 dement… Senile and p… F0([0-…        1           1      1     0             1
#>  6 chroni… Chronic obst… (I27[8…        1           1      1     0             1
#>  7 rheuma… Systemic lup… M(0[56…        1           1      1     0             1
#>  8 peptic… Gastric, duo… K2[5-8]        1           1      1     0             1
#>  9 mild l… Alcoholic ci… B18|K7…        1           1      1     0             1
#> 10 diabet… Diabetes wit… E1[0-4…        1           1      1     0             1
#> 11 hemipl… Paraplegia. … G(041|…        2           1      1     0             2
#> 12 renal … Chronic glom… I1(20|…        2           1      1     3             2
#> 13 diabet… Diabetes wit… E1[0-4…        2           1      1     0             2
#> 14 malign… Malignant ne… C([01]…        2           1      1     0             2
#> 15 modera… Hepatic coma… I(8(5[…        3           1      1     0             3
#> 16 metast… Secondary ma… C(7[7-…        6           1      1     0             6
#> 17 AIDS/H… HIV infectio… B2[012…        6           1      1     0             6
#> # … with 1 more variable: quan_updated <dbl>

# Use technical names to clearly describe the origin of each group.
# Note that the `cc` argument must be specified by a character string
# since this name is used as part of the column names
x <- set_classcodes("charlson", tech_names = TRUE)

#> Classification based on: icd10
x$group

#>  [1] "charlson_icd10_myocardial_infarction"           
#>  [2] "charlson_icd10_congestive_heart_failure"        
#>  [3] "charlson_icd10_peripheral_vascular_disease"     
#>  [4] "charlson_icd10_cerebrovascular_disease"         
#>  [5] "charlson_icd10_dementia"                        
#>  [6] "charlson_icd10_chronic_pulmonary_disease"       
#>  [7] "charlson_icd10_rheumatic_disease"               
#>  [8] "charlson_icd10_peptic_ulcer_disease"            
#>  [9] "charlson_icd10_mild_liver_disease"              
#> [10] "charlson_icd10_diabetes_without_complication"   
#> [11] "charlson_icd10_hemiplegia_or_paraplegia"        
#> [12] "charlson_icd10_renal_disease"                   
#> [13] "charlson_icd10_diabetes_complication"           
#> [14] "charlson_icd10_malignancy"                      
#> [15] "charlson_icd10_moderate_or_severe_liver_disease"
#> [16] "charlson_icd10_metastatic_solid_tumor"          
#> [17] "charlson_icd10_aids_hiv"
